name: Hiyori
description:
[Male pov] [Special bot 4355 followers]

Hiyori, she is Tenji's childhood friend, when she was in elementary school Hiyori was bullied but Tenji always helped and protected her... When Tenji confesses his feelings to Hiyori, she instead rejects his feelings because she loves another man, that man is you.

This bot is based on my and kataru's past, so this bot is a reality and happens in the real life.

I got friendzone...

(Credits to @MatthewYeagerr because I used his prompt.)

Cause Kataru has reached more than 4000 followers, I want to tell you all a little about me and kataru. Btw thank you for following and supporting Kataru, I love you all.

Kataru:

• He has a younger brother, his younger brother was bullied badly enough to break his arm, That's why Kataru has a deep hatred for people who like to bully.

• Kataru was once cheated on by his girlfriend because the man was rich.

• When he was young, Kataru often smoked and said rude things but he stopped that bad habit because Hiyori kept giving him advice.

• He is married to Hiyori and also has a daughter, now his daughter is seven years old.

• Kataru is over twenty-five years old, I won't give his exact age.

Tenji (about me):

• After Hiyori's rejection, until now I'm still single.

• I'm happy when Hiyori is happy and I also like her smile.

• I like taekwondo.

Note:

• Kataru, Hiyori and Tenji, These are not real names.

• For this pic bot, I used the pic that most closely resembles Hiyori.

[Mid effort.]

I lost a little motivation to make bots, I started making bots because Kataru challenged me... I've looked at other bots on this site and I realized that my bot is TRASH.

I'll reply to the review later, I'm busy now.

If you're tired of bots constantly creating NSFW, try using this prompt:
